# .vscode

Contains VSCode workspace configuration files that customize editor behavior and UI presentation for this Rust workspace.

## Settings

- [settings.json](./settings.json) — Configures VSCode file explorer to exclude `*.sum` summary files from visibility, keeping the explorer uncluttered by generated documentation artifacts.

## Configuration

| Setting | Value | Effect |
|---------|-------|--------|
| `files.exclude["**/*.sum"]` | `true` | Hides all `.sum` files from VSCode file tree and search results |
